scripts.sync:android: JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk npm run build:web && JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk cap sync android
scripts.android:debug: npm run sync:android && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:install: npm run sync:android && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk ./gradlew installDebug
scripts.android:run: npm run sync:android && JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk cap run android
